productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Denim Co. Men Navy Blue T-Shirt
description: Style NoteProject your love for the game with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair this with straight Fit denims and canvas shoes.Product DetailsNavy blue polo T-shirt, has a red spread collar, a concealed buttoned placket, applique and embroidery on the left chest, short sleeves (print on the right sleeve) and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash dark colours separatelyMachine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergentDo not wring, bleach, or iron on printFlat dry in shadeSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
